title: More Nonsense Limerick 35
content:
There was an old person of Loo,
    Who said, "What on earth shall I do?"
    When they said, "Go away!" 
    She continued to stay,
    That vexatious old person of Loo.
meaning:
Edward Lear's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "More Nonsense Limerick 35"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
